title: 086.jar
description: the faceless steve. his world his commands
body:
# The Faceless Steve: Survival Horror Experience
The Faceless Steve is a psychological horror mod that turns your Minecraft world into a paranoid game of survival. You are no longer alone, and you are being watched.

Unlike typical horror mods that just throw loud monsters at you, this mod is built on dread. A mysterious, blank-faced figure stalks you from a distance, watching your every move from the fog. But he doesn't just watch—he manipulates your world. As he stalks you, he will spawn bizarre, twisted, faceless abominations that will actively hunt you down and attack.
